title: Lost Nights
description:
Uncomplicated exploration and fantasy Modpack.
- Fabric - 
Minecraft 1.20.1
body:
**Description:**

This modpack is for anyone who loves the exploration and RPG elements of Minecraft. Set in a medieval fantasy Theme, it introduces a variety of new biomes, structures, and dungeons for you to explore. Additionally, it enhances the game with more RPG and decorative elements. While the  modpack still retains the core gameplay of Minecraft it would not be considerd vanilla friendly.

**What was added / changed:**
- Many New biomes
- Overhauled The Nether & The End
- Better Overworld World-Generation
- Various new unique bosses
- New materials and armor
- Many unique and polished new structures to explore 
- Various Performance enhancements

**Focus:**
exploration and pve.

Recommended texture pack: none.

Recommended shader: Solas Shader.

**Important:** The modpack contains around 100 mods, so it requires at least 4GB of RAM to run smoothly! For the best performance, 6GB of RAM is recommended.

hf
